profile.title: ResumeProfile
profile.description: A saved profile containing the translated Japanese Shokumukeirekisho and original metadata

userId.description: Firebase Auth UID or null for local guest profiles

name.description: User-friendly nickname or title of this profile draft

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this profile was initialized

originalResumeText.description: Raw English resume text inputted or parsed

data.description: Detailed Shokumukeirekisho structures matching standard Japanese forms

/profiles/{profileId}.description: Secure storage module for saved profiles and generated CV documents
